Brand Standards — Quick Reference Restoring Motion. Restoring Life.
Restoring motion.
Restoring life.
GraMedica (Graham Medical Technologies, LLC) is the manufacturer of HyProCure®, the world's leading titanium sinus tarsi stent. These standards govern every brand touchpoint — digital, print, field, and clinical.
Phase 0 — Brand Foundation v1.0 — March 2026 Class C — Internal
02 — Color System
Brand Color Palette
Navy — Primary Dark
#0D1B2A
R13 G27 B42 · C69 M36 Y0 K84
Primary Blue — Light BG only
#0071CA
R0 G113 B202 · C100 M44 Y0 K21
Digital Blue — Dark BG only
#27B1FA
R39 G177 B250 · C84 M29 Y0 K2
Footer Gray — Email only
#F2F4F7
R242 G244 B247 · C2 M1 Y0 K3
TWO-BLUE RULE
#0071CA on white/light backgrounds only.
#27B1FA on navy/dark backgrounds only.
Never swap these contexts.
03 — Typography
Type System
Outfit — Heading Font
GraMedica
Outfit Medium — Subheads
HyProCure® Sinus Tarsi Stent
DM Sans — Body Copy
Evidence-based solutions for foot & ankle surgeons worldwide. Professional, globally appropriate.
Arial — Office / Outlook Fallback
Arial replaces Outfit & DM Sans when Google Fonts are unavailable.
Download (SIL OFL):
fonts.google.com/specimen/Outfit
fonts.google.com/specimen/DM+Sans
04 — Logo Usage
Logo Variants
Blue BG / White Logo
Email headers, digital dark contexts
BluWhtHzV212.png
White BG / Black Logo
Letterhead, email footers, documents
BlkWhtHzV24.png
Navy BG / White Logo
Dark digital hero sections, print
WhtBlkHzV217.png
Square Stacked — Sig Only
Email signatures, 100px wide
WhtBlkSqrV214.png
Retired: Blue circle "G" wordmark — DO NOT USE on any new materials.
05 — Email Standards
v2 Template — LOCKED Mar 11
email header — #0071CA
footer — #F2F4F7 background
  • Header: #0071CA + white logo (BluWhtHzV212.png)
  • Footer: #F2F4F7 + black logo (BlkWhtHzV24.png)
  • Images: Base64 embedded for internal / rep / distributor
  • Hosted images when ESP is involved
  • Signature: WhtBlkSqrV214.png @ 100px — V9 installer only
06 — Voice & Tone
By Audience
Surgeons
MD / DPM
Professional, evidence-based, peer-to-peer. Clinical credibility first.
Patients
Warm, clear, empathetic. No jargon. Benefit-focused, never alarming.
Field Reps
US 1099
Direct, action-oriented, sales-enabling. Deal sheets, commission clarity.
Intl Distributors
Professional, translation-ready. No idioms, global-first construction.
Corporate /
Investor
Confident, data-informed, concise. Market size, clinical evidence.
Class A Clinical — QA mandatory
Class B Educational — QA recommended
Class C Corporate — No QA required
HyProCure® Stent
HyProCure® I & II
Instrument Set
Brand Rules
Do's & Don'ts
✓ DO
Use #0071CA on white backgrounds
Use #27B1FA on navy/dark only
Match logo variant to background
Use Outfit for all headings
Use tagline verbatim
Flag clinical content [QA REVIEW]
✗ DON'T
Swap blue contexts across backgrounds
Use the old "circle G" wordmark
Use retired tagline "Changing lives..."
Paraphrase IFU language — verbatim only
Invent clinical claims or statistics
Apply CSS filters to logo files
07 — Digital Brand
Dark & Light Contexts
Dark Context
BG: #0D1B2A
Accent: #27B1FA
Text: White #FFFFFF
Light Context
BG: #FFFFFF
Accent: #0071CA
Text: Navy #0D1B2A
⚠ Accessibility Note: #27B1FA on white fails WCAG 2.1 AA (ratio ~2.8:1). Use on dark backgrounds only. Web accessibility standard decision pending — see Decision Review doc.
08 — AI Tool Prompt Toolkit
Copy & Paste into Any AI Tool
Master Context Block (Canva / ChatGPT / Gemini / Claude)
You are creating content for GraMedica (Graham Medical Technologies, LLC), a medical device manufacturer in Rochester, MI. Product: HyProCure®, titanium sinus tarsi stent.

Brand rules: GraMedica = company, HyProCure = product. Tagline: "Restoring motion. Restoring life." — verbatim only. NEVER use "Changing lives, one step at a time."

Colors: #0071CA on light BG · #27B1FA on dark BG only · Navy #0D1B2A · Footer gray #F2F4F7.
Fonts: Outfit (headings) · DM Sans (body) · Arial (fallback).
Clinical content: Flag all claims [QA REVIEW REQUIRED]. No new claims.
Email Add-on
Add: HTML email — blue header (#0071CA) / white body / gray footer (#F2F4F7). Audience: [STATE]. Base64 images. One CTA.
Class A Flag
⚠ Clinical content only. Add: Do not create new claims. IFU language verbatim. Flag every claim [QA REVIEW REQUIRED].
